message: WMI-3 attacker content into authoritative position (attacker-pointer-into-field): content is installed into struct field 'vgem_buf_state.has_ring' — the position the confused consumer later follows as a trusted reference. [mechanism:attacker-pointer-into-field;indicates=WMI-3] [mem:struct=vgem_buf_state;field=has_ring;offset=2] [oracle:assert=has_ring holds trusted, not attacker-determined, content;assume=externally-originated content installed into the field]
